text:
Limeiro (リーメイロ, Rīmeiro) is the capital of Greed Island. Not only the castle, even the streets of the city are full of energy. The last event of the game is held in this city. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 183 

Overview

The big castle where, according to rumors, Game Masters live is the city's symbol. The players who clear the game, arrive in this city and receive an impressive welcome as the game's ending. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Right after Gon receives an invitation from an owl and a confrontation with Gashta and Zetsk Bellam, Killua uses a "Drift" spell card until he reaches Limeiro. He then reconvenes with Gon and Biscuit, and they all use an "Accompany" to reach Limeiro. 

Gon enters the castle, where he is greeted by List, who welcomes him. List leads Gon to a garbage-filled slipshod room where a sloven man named Dwun, who is playing a video game greets Gon. List and Dwun get acquainted with Gon and later a parade followed by a party is held in Gon's honor for beating the game. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 184
